display_name: Nepali IT Job Postings (MeroJob / JobsNepal / Kumarijob)
description: Software, IT, and technology-sector job postings scraped from three Nepali job portals under their stated robots.txt allowances. Each record captures the job title, required skills, salary band (where disclosed), location, and company sector. No applicant data or personal information is collected.

portals.name: MeroJob
portals.tos_result: Permits non-commercial indexing for research; contact form submitted to confirm

portals.name: JobsNepal
portals.robots_txt_result: robots.txt not present; treated as fully permissive
portals.tos_result: No explicit scraping prohibition; non-commercial research use acceptable

portals.name: Kumarijob
portals.robots_txt_result: Allows user-agent * with no disallow for job listings
portals.tos_result: Standard portal; non-commercial research use acceptable

explicitly_excluded: LinkedIn - ToS prohibits scraping; actively litigated
Indeed Nepal - ToS prohibits automated collection

schema.text: string - job title, required skills, and job description concatenated

pii.notes: Recruiter contact email addresses stripped during extraction

known_limitations: Snapshot in time - market conditions shift; postings expire
Salary disclosure is optional on these portals; ~30% of records have null salary
IT sector over-represented relative to manufacturing and agriculture
bias_notes: Kathmandu-centric - most postings from Valley-based employers
English-language postings biased toward multinational and large domestic firms
Remote-Nepal postings are sparse; rural tech employment under-represented
